mapper.sql: s.id, s.category_id, s.name, s.code, s.icon, s.description, s.skill_type, s.endpoint, s.timeout_ms, s.input_schema, s.status, s.sort_order, s.use_count, s.version, s.created_by, s.created_at, s.updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT s.*, c.name AS category_name FROM ai_skill s LEFT JOIN ai_skill_category c ON s.category_id = c.id WHERE s.id = #{id}
SELECT s.*, c.name AS category_name FROM ai_skill s LEFT JOIN ai_skill_category c ON s.category_id = c.id WHERE s.code = #{code}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_skill WHERE code = #{code} AND id != #{excludeId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_skill WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_skill (category_id, name, code, icon, description, skill_type, endpoint, timeout_ms, input_schema, status, sort_order, use_count, version, created_by, created_at) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{name}, #{code}, #{icon}, #{description}, #{skillType}, #{endpoint}, #{timeoutMs}, #{inputSchema}, #{status}, #{sortOrder}, 0, #{version}, #{createdBy}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_skill SET use_count = use_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
